raw_intent: Ship Crimson Compass demo build to itch.io by end of week. Need playable 3-level vertical slice with spy gadget mechanics working. BRS should handle the itch.io listing and marketing copy. AAC should prepare to reinvest any early access revenue into DUBFORGE development.

grok_enrichment.context: Crimson Compass is a spy thriller game built in Unity/C#. Current state: core mechanics prototyped, 5 levels designed, gadget system 60% complete. itch.io is the target platform for early access. DUBFORGE is the dubstep music engine - next priority after game ship.
constraints: Must be playable vertical slice, not full game
3 levels minimum with gadget mechanics functional
AAC earmarks revenue for DUBFORGE, not general fund
success_criteria: Listing live with screenshots and description
Revenue routing configured to AAC with DUBFORGE tag
